title: Gamemode Changer
description: This project allows you to use F4+F3 (and F3+N) whether you have permission or not using configurable commands accessable by modmenu!
body: This mod allows you to use F3+F4 gamemode changer (and F3+N) on any server using configurable commands on a specific gamemode. You can put any command or chat message when toggling a gamemode in the config menu found using modmenu. This mod does not give any unfair advantage, only making it faster to change gamemode and remove the annoying you do not have permission message when trying to use the gamemode changer.
